Class ScoreGameCLI

java.lang.Object
whistapp.ui.CLI
whistapp.ui.GameCLI
whistapp.ui.ScoreGameCLI
public class ScoreGameCLI extends GameCLI
CLI for tracking the score of a physical Whist game.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class CLI

    controller, scanner

    Description
    protected void
    showAllRounds()
    Drive the round loop: repeatedly play a round until the user indicates they do not want to play another round.
    protected void
    showIntro()
    Clear the screen and show a short introduction describing this CLI mode.
    protected void
    showRound()
    Interactively register a single round: ask and register final active bids for each player, ask and register if there was a reshuffle, ask and register number of tricks won per player.

  • Constructor Details

    • ScoreGameCLI

      public ScoreGameCLI(Controller controller)
      Create a ScoreGameCLI bound to the given controller.
      Parameters:
      controller - the application controller used to register players, bids and trick counts (must not be null)

  • Method Details

    • showIntro

      protected void showIntro()
      Clear the screen and show a short introduction describing this CLI mode.
      Specified by:
      showIntro in class GameCLI

    • startNewGame

      protected void startNewGame()
      Prompt the user to enter player names and start a new game with the controller.

      This method will loop until valid names are provided. If initialization fails the method clears the screen and asks again.

      On success the registered names are printed to standard output.

      Specified by:
      startNewGame in class GameCLI

    • showAllRounds

      protected void showAllRounds()
      Drive the round loop: repeatedly play a round until the user indicates they do not want to play another round.
      Specified by:
      showAllRounds in class GameCLI

    • showRound

      protected void showRound()
      Interactively register a single round:
      1. ask and register final active bids for each player,
      2. ask and register if there was a reshuffle,
      3. ask and register number of tricks won per player.

      Errors when registering bids or trick counts clear the screen, display the error, and allow the user to try again.

      After successful registration the method prints the registered bids and trick counts to standard output.
